radius-circle.$description: circle idiom for square dots/avatars (10+ consumers)

font-ui.$value: 'Noto Sans KR', 'IBM Plex Sans KR', -apple-system, sans-serif

font-size-sm.$description: intentional override: Tailwind v4 default is 14px

font-size-md.$description: intentional addition: Tailwind v4 has no built-in md

frost-100.$description: Tailwind slate-200 alias (kept legacy frost name)

white-pure.$description: Pure white #ffffff (canon constant, distinct from --text-strong tints)

text-body.$description: Default body copy on dark surfaces

text-slate.$description: Custom cool gray (no Tailwind exact match)

shadow-cmd-palette.$description: command palette modal — more diffuse than --shadow-3 (40px blur vs 32px)

shadow-drawer-left.$description: right-anchored drawer — directional shadow casting toward main content

hover-overlay-strong.$description: for tr:hover that must read brighter than the zebra row using --hover-overlay

button-primary-bg-hover.$description: ActionButton variant=primary hover bg (Tailwind hover: + data-[hover])

button-ghost-bg-pressed.$description: ActionButton variant=ghost [data-pressed] bg (swaps to accent for selection clarity)

dialog-panel-bg.$description: DialogOverlay panel surface bg (most-common consumer literal)

dialog-overlay-bg.$description: DialogOverlay scrim base color (pair with /60 or /70 opacity)

toast-bg.$description: ToastContainer surface bg (deep navy with slight transparency for backdrop blend)

tab-bg-active.$description: active tab surface bg (one selection at a time)

tab-bg-hover.$description: tab hover surface bg (preview of active affordance)

tab-indicator.$description: 1px bottom stripe under active tab (brass — single selection)

sidebar-bg.$description: sidebar surface bg (chrome — same elevation as topbar)

sidebar-icon-fg.$description: sidebar icon resting fg (muted — keeps text primary)

sidebar-icon-active-fg.$description: sidebar icon active fg (brass — selected nav)

sidebar-section-header-fg.$description: sidebar group header label fg (uppercase mono meta)

panel-resize-handle-hover.$description: splitter on hover/drag (brass — affordance, not decoration)

terminal-bg.$description: terminal pane bg (deepest surface — distinct from chrome)

terminal-prompt.$description: shell prompt sigil fg (brass — active input cursor anchor)

terminal-cursor.$description: block cursor fill (matches prompt for visual cohesion)

terminal-selection-bg.$description: terminal text selection bg (brass-tinted — same family as state-active-bg)

menu-bg.$description: menu surface bg (elevated card; sits above editor / chrome)

menu-border.$description: menu border (emphasized — overlay surface needs definition)

menu-shadow.$description: menu drop shadow (elev-4 — overlay layer above chrome)

menu-separator.$description: menu role=separator divider (subtle hairline between groups)

menu-shortcut-fg.$description: aria-keyshortcuts trailing label fg (muted mono — secondary signal)

tooltip-shadow.$description: tooltip drop shadow (elev-2 — lighter than menu, transient)

toast-bg-info.$description: toast surface bg for severity=info (info-soft semantic)

toast-bg-success.$description: toast surface bg for severity=success (ok-soft semantic)

toast-bg-warning.$description: toast surface bg for severity=warning (warn-soft semantic)

toast-bg-error.$description: toast surface bg for severity=error (err-soft semantic)

toast-fg.$description: toast text fg (primary — same across severities; tint in bg)

toast-shadow.$description: toast drop shadow (elev-5 — floats above modals at z-toast)

terminal-ansi-white.$description: ANSI 7 — white (secondary fg — softer than primary)

terminal-ansi-bright-red.$description: ANSI 9 — bright red (err-fg pinned: #d8806f, WCAG AA on bg-0)

terminal-ansi-bright-cyan.$description: ANSI 14 — bright cyan (keeper-9 sky: #62a0ca — sky lifts cyan)

terminal-ansi-bright-white.$description: ANSI 15 — bright white (primary fg: #f0e9dc — never pure white)

color-text-dim.$description: legacy alias; collapses to fg-3 same as muted

color-accent-brass.$description: legacy alias for the brass primary

color-accent-soft.$description: legacy alias for the brass soft tint

bad-light.$description: legacy alias for body-on-tinted error text

warn-bright.$description: legacy alias for body-on-tinted warn text
